creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 162057
update www/qupzila to 1.8.7

Nobody else testing the -qt5 variant has reported this problem. There's not much context for the failure report so I'll assume it's with poudriere and x11extras wasn't available in the build jail because it's not listed in the port but presumably is required. That appears to be a new thing for Qt5 so only affects this newer port variant. I refreshed the patch with that addition.
